title: Package Removal Flow
activity_flow: START: Receive list of OperationInterface[] containing UninstallOperation(s)
BATCH SPLIT: Group operations into batches — plugin-modifying-downloads get their own batch first
LOOP each batch → downloadAndExecuteBatch(repo, batch, cleanupPromises, ...)
IF opType == 'uninstall': register cleanupPromise (installer->cleanup), SKIP download phase
IF opType == 'install'|'update': call installer->download() and collect promise
AWAIT all download promises (waitOnPromises via Loop)
IF downloadOnly == true: runCleanup(cleanupPromises) and return early
INNER BATCH SPLIT: plugin/installer-type packages get isolated sub-batches
LOOP each sub-batch → executeBatch(repo, subBatch, cleanupPromises, ...)
CHECK repo->hasPackage(package) — THROW InvalidArgumentException if false
IF package name contains '/': check if vendor sub-dir is empty → rmdir if so
THEN: repo->write(devMode, installationManager) [persist repo after each op]
ON ERROR: io->writeError('Uninstall of <name> failed'), rethrow
AFTER all batches: repo->write(devMode, installationManager) [final lock-file-repo write]
UPDATE LOCK FILE: locker->setLockData(newPackages, newDevPackages, platformReqs, ...) [write composer.lock]
key_conditions: repo->hasPackage(package) must be true, else throw InvalidArgumentException
downloadOnly=true → cleanup runs immediately, no uninstall executed
package->getType() == 'metapackage' → getDownloaderForPackage returns null, no file removal
installationSource must be 'dist' or 'source', else throws InvalidArgumentException
empty vendor sub-dir after file removal → rmdir called
plugin-modifying-downloads packages are batched first in execute()
composer-plugin/composer-installer types get isolated sub-batches in downloadAndExecuteBatch()
key_relationships: InstallationManager composes InstallerInterface[] (addInstaller/getInstaller by package type)
DownloadManager composes DownloaderInterface[] keyed by type (zip, git, svn, etc.)
InstallationManager uses Loop for async promise waiting
Installer orchestrates InstallationManager + Locker for full uninstall pipeline

method_signatures.InstallationManager::execute: execute(InstalledRepositoryInterface $repo, OperationInterface[] $operations, bool $devMode, bool $runScripts, bool $downloadOnly): void

async_model: React Promises — all install/update/uninstall steps return PromiseInterface; Loop::wait() blocks until resolved; cleanup promise chained after each op; signal handlers (SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP) trigger runCleanup()
important_notes: Removal is async (ReactPHP promises). cleanupPromise is always registered even for uninstall to handle abort/signal scenarios. repo->write() is called after EACH individual operation AND again at the end of execute(). Lock file update (locker->setLockData) happens in Installer::run(), not in InstallationManager. BinaryInstaller handles bin-dir symlink/shim cleanup. Empty vendor namespace dirs are pruned automatically.
